boundary: These profiles are MuJoCo modeling references, not procurement approvals or real-camera validation.

board_level_rgb_side_macro.intended_role: Default synthetic eye-in-hand camera for ophthalmic trocar ROI rendering and visual-servo experiments.
board_level_rgb_side_macro.hardware_reference_family: Basler dart-style board-level USB/GigE industrial camera with C/CS/S-mount lens options.
board_level_rgb_side_macro.mounting_assumption: Side-mounted beside the instrument shaft to reduce shaft occlusion.

real_calibration_reference.intended_role: Compatibility profile using the current calibrated real camera intrinsics converted to MuJoCo fovy.

external_depth_reference.intended_role: Optional future external or bench-mounted depth reference, not the default wrist camera.
external_depth_reference.hardware_reference_family: Intel RealSense D405-like close-range depth camera.
external_depth_reference.reason_not_default: The physical device class is larger and heavier than a board-level RGB camera, so it is better treated as an external validation reference for this ophthalmic wrist-camera task.
